'''Kreva''' was the native spoken and written [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Krevaaki]] species from [[Krevas]].<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" /> [[Vandar Tokare]] was familiar with the Kreva language.

{{Language-stub}}
